Custom Replacement A-Frame Signs for Business Storefronts

Replace your worn A-frame signage with durable corrugated plastic replacement signs designed for outdoor commercial use. These custom A-frame signs feature full-color digital printing on weatherproof materials that withstand extreme temperatures and outdoor conditions for up to 2 years.

Available in standard A-frame sizes (27" x 22" or 36" x 24"), each replacement sign includes unlimited text, colors, logos, and graphics with professional full-color printing. Perfect for restaurants, retail stores, service businesses, and any commercial application requiring professional outdoor signage.

A-Frame Sign Features:

  • Standard 4mm corrugated plastic construction
  • Full-color digital printing with 1/2" white border
  • Waterproof and weather-resistant material
  • Withstands extreme hot and cold temperatures
  • Lightweight yet durable for daily use
  • 2-year outdoor durability rating
  • Single-sided printing for standard A-frame displays

Request a material sample packet to evaluate our corrugated plastic quality for your A-frame sign replacement needs.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement A-Frame Sign Material for Outdoor Installations

Our replacement A-frame signs are manufactured using premium 4mm corrugated plastic, specifically chosen for outdoor commercial applications. This material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard construction but with superior durability and weather resistance.

Corrugated Plastic Material Benefits:

  • Lightweight construction for easy A-frame installation
  • 100% waterproof plastic material
  • Slightly ribbed surface for enhanced print quality
  • Temperature resistant from -40°F to 180°F
  • UV-resistant for extended outdoor exposure
  • Non-toxic and recyclable material
  • Resistant to cracking and breaking

The corrugated plastic construction provides excellent durability while maintaining the lightweight properties essential for A-frame sign applications. This material choice ensures your replacement signs will perform consistently in all weather conditions.

Standard thickness of 4mm provides the optimal balance between durability and weight for A-frame mounting systems.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Finishing Options for Professional Display

Each replacement A-frame sign includes professional finishing options designed to maximize visual impact and ensure proper fit within standard A-frame systems.

Standard Finishing Features:

  • 1/2" white border around all edges (standard)
  • Full-bleed printing option available
  • Precision cutting to exact A-frame dimensions
  • Smooth edge finishing for professional appearance
  • Corner rounding available upon request
  • Single-sided printing optimized for A-frame display

Size Specifications:

  • 27" x 22" - Standard compact A-frame size
  • 36" x 24" - Large format A-frame size
  • Custom sizing available for specialty A-frame systems

All replacement signs are cut and finished to ensure proper fit within your existing A-frame hardware. The standard white border provides a clean, professional appearance while the full-bleed option maximizes your design coverage.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom A-Frame Sign Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production schedules ranging from 1 to 5 business days to meet your A-frame sign replacement timeline requirements.

1 Business Day Priority Production:

  • Fastest turnaround for urgent A-frame sign needs
  • Orders approved by 5:00 PM CST ship next business day
  • Same-day emergency service available in select cases
  • Premium pricing for expedited production

2 Business Days Express Production:

  • Quick turnaround with cost savings over priority service
  • Ideal for planned A-frame sign replacements
  • Full quality control and inspection included

3 Business Days Standard Production:

  • Most popular production option
  • No additional production charges
  • Complete quality assurance process
  • Optimal balance of speed and value

5 Business Days Saver Production:

  • Maximum cost savings for non-urgent orders
  • Full production quality and attention
  • Best value for bulk A-frame sign orders

Production time begins once artwork approval is received and payment is processed. Proof approval and file upload completion determine the start of production scheduling.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Payment & Ordering Options

Secure payment processing ensures your replacement A-frame sign order begins production promptly upon artwork approval.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Business and personal credit cards accepted
  • Check payments for established accounts
  • Corporate purchase orders for qualified businesses

Payment Processing Timeline:

  • Credit cards charged only after proof approval
  • Check payments must clear before production begins
  • No payment processed until final artwork confirmation
  • Secure SSL encryption for all online transactions

For check payments, allow additional processing time as orders enter production only after payment clearance. Corporate accounts may qualify for net payment terms upon credit approval.

All A-frame sign orders require full payment before production begins to ensure prompt delivery within your selected timeline.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom A-Frame Sign Delivery

Professional packaging and reliable shipping ensure your replacement A-frame signs arrive safely and on schedule.

Available Shipping Methods:

  • Standard Shipping (3-5 business days)
  • Three Day Express (3 business days guaranteed)
  • Two Day Priority (2 business days guaranteed)
  • Overnight Express (1 business day guaranteed)
  • Freight shipping for large A-frame sign orders

Shipping Coverage & Pricing:

  • Continental US shipping rates based on weight and destination
  • Maximum package dimensions calculated at 3' x 4'
  • Tracking numbers provided for all shipments
  • International shipping available with customer-provided labels

Package Protection:

  • Professional protective packaging for A-frame signs
  • Damage replacement policy for shipping incidents
  • Lost package replacement after carrier confirmation
  • Full tracking visibility throughout delivery process

A-frame signs are manufactured exclusively at our Minnesota facility to ensure consistent quality and reliable shipping throughout the continental United States.

For oversized orders or special delivery requirements, contact our shipping specialists for customized freight solutions.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Commercial Applications for Replacement A-Frame Signs

Replacement A-frame signs serve diverse commercial and promotional applications across multiple industries and business types.

Restaurant & Food Service Applications:

  • Daily menu specials and promotional displays
  • Sidewalk cafe seating and dining announcements
  • Food truck and mobile vendor signage
  • Happy hour and event promotional signs

Retail & Commercial Uses:

  • Store hours and service announcements
  • Sale promotions and special offers
  • New product launches and seasonal displays
  • Storefront branding and welcome messages

Service Business Applications:

  • Professional services and appointment scheduling
  • Automotive service specials and promotions
  • Health and wellness service announcements
  • Real estate open house and property information

Event & Promotional Uses:

  • Trade show and exhibition displays
  • Community event information and directions
  • Political campaign and awareness messaging
  • Educational institution announcements

The weatherproof construction and professional appearance make these replacement signs ideal for any outdoor commercial application requiring reliable, attractive signage display.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

A-Frame Sign Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Professional artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and accurate reproduction of your A-frame sign design.

Preferred File Formats:

  • .EPS files converted to outlines (highest quality)
  • High-resolution .PDF files (300 DPI minimum)
  • .TIFF and .JPG files at 300 DPI or higher
  • Maximum file size: 60 MB for standard uploads

Design Specifications:

  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for crisp printing
  • Color mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed area: 1/8" beyond final trim size
  • Safe area: Keep important text 1/4" from edges

Professional Design Services Available:

  • Custom design creation by experienced graphic designers
  • Logo recreation and enhancement services
  • File format conversion and optimization
  • Brand guideline compliance assistance

Proof and Approval Process:

  • Digital proof provided for all custom designs
  • Color-critical projects utilize color match proof system
  • Unlimited revisions until design approval
  • Final approval required before production begins

For files larger than 60 MB or specialized artwork assistance, contact our design team for personalized support and faster processing solutions.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Replacement A-Frame Signs Today

Replace your worn or outdated A-frame signage with professional-quality custom signs designed for reliable outdoor performance. Our corrugated plastic replacement signs deliver superior durability and visual impact for your business displays.

Why Choose Our Replacement A-Frame Signs:

  • In-house customer service team of professional graphic designers
  • Flexible 1-5 day production schedules to meet your timeline
  • Premium materials and state-of-the-art digital printing
  • Live order tracking throughout production and shipping
  • 100% satisfaction guarantee on all custom signage

Three Easy Ways to Order:

  • Online Designer: Choose from professional templates and customize instantly
  • File Upload: Submit your print-ready artwork for direct production
  • Professional Design: Work with our designers for completely custom signage

Ready to upgrade your A-frame display? Select your preferred size and design method above, or contact our customer service team at 320.391.5300 for personalized assistance with your replacement A-frame sign project.

Our experienced team will help you create professional signage that enhances your business visibility and attracts more customers to your location.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Replacement A-Frame Sign FAQ

What material are replacement A-frame signs made from?

Our replacement A-frame signs are manufactured using 4mm corrugated plastic, a lightweight yet durable material that features hollow flutes for strength while maintaining easy handling for A-frame installation.

How long do A-frame signs last outdoors?

Our corrugated plastic A-frame signs are designed for up to 2 years of outdoor use, withstanding extreme temperatures, rain, snow, and UV exposure without fading or deteriorating.

What sizes are available for A-frame replacement signs?

Standard replacement sizes include 27" x 22" and 36" x 24" to fit most common A-frame display systems. Custom sizing is available for specialty A-frame configurations.

Can I get a proof before my A-frame signs are printed?

Yes, digital proofs are available for all orders. You'll receive a low-resolution preview via email showing your design, pricing, and order details. Production begins only after your approval.

Do you offer same-day production for urgent A-frame sign needs?

Emergency same-day production may be available in select cases. Contact our customer service team at 320.391.5300 to discuss your urgent timeline requirements.

What file formats work best for A-frame sign printing?

EPS files converted to outlines provide the highest quality results. We also accept high-resolution PDF, TIFF, and JPG files at 300 DPI or higher resolution.

Is the white border required on A-frame signs?

A standard 1/2" white border is included with all signs, but full-bleed printing is available to maximize your design coverage to the edges of the sign.

How are A-frame signs shipped to prevent damage?

All A-frame signs receive professional protective packaging, and we provide tracking numbers for delivery monitoring. Damaged items are replaced at no additional cost.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
